_comment: English translation for international academic market

hero.accent: AI Research Assistant · Literature Review Copilot
hero.title: Accelerate Your <highlight>Literature Review</highlight> Research
hero.subtitle: AI-assisted literature analysis with verified citations. Extract key insights, build structured outlines, and draft review frameworks — all backed by real paper metadata.
hero.cta_hint: Free to try • No credit card required

stats.time: Focus on Last 6 Years - Frontier Research Only

input.title: Start Your Literature Analysis
input.subtitle: Sign up and get 1 free review. Enter a topic, get an AI-assisted literature analysis draft.
input.placeholder: Enter your research topic, e.g., Deep Learning in Image Recognition
input.search_papers_hint: Just want to find related papers?

features.title: Why Choose AutoOverview?
features.papers_desc: Literature review framework built on verified papers. AI assists in extracting key insights and structuring your analysis.
features.time: Focus on Last 6 Years - Frontier Research Only
features.time_desc: Academic research prioritizes recency. We focus on the latest literature, not generic overviews.
features.format: Structured Draft Framework, Ready for Your Input
features.format_desc: Background → Current Status → Debates → Conclusions → Future Directions. A structured framework for you to build upon.

free_ai.title: Elicit / Scite / Paperpal
free_ai.con1: ❌ Fragmented summary aggregation, not structured drafts
free_ai.con2: ❌ Cannot submit directly, requires manual assembly
free_ai.con4: ❌ Just a search assistant, not a research copilot

autooverview.title: AutoOverview
autooverview.pro2: ✅ Built on real paper metadata, with DOI verification
autooverview.pro4: ✅ Research copilot that accelerates your workflow

process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: Three steps to accelerate your research
process.step1_desc: Enter your topic. AI analyzes and retrieves frontier research from the last 6 years.
process.step2_title: AI Assists in Building Your Review
process.step2_desc: AI helps organize findings into a structured outline (Background → Debates → Conclusions), extracting key insights from verified papers.
process.step3_desc: Download your draft framework + DOI verification report. Review and add your own analysis before finalizing.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No subscription. Credits never expire.
pricing.note: No subscription • Credits never expire • Customer satisfaction focused

demo.title: Sample Reviews
demo.subtitle: See the quality before you commit

testimonials.title: Trusted by Researchers Worldwide
testimonials.text1: "Provides a solid framework — from background to debates. I add my own analysis and it's ready."
testimonials.text2: "The Anti-Hallucination Report is incredibly useful. All DOIs verifiable with one click. Saved me hours."
testimonials.text3: "The 6-year focus is professional. The analysis is current and gives me a great starting point for my paper."

integrity.title: Academic Integrity Commitment
integrity.description: We are committed to academic integrity. All citations are designed to be real and verifiable. AI-generated content is intended as a research aid — users are responsible for reviewing, editing, and adding original analysis.
integrity.link: Learn about our citation verification process →

footer.databases: Supported: Web of Science, IEEE, CrossRef, Semantic Scholar

progress.hint: You can leave this page. The review will continue generating in the background.

meta.title: Search Related Academic Papers - Free Tool | AutoOverview
meta.description: Find related academic papers for free. Search by title and discover literature from 200M+ papers across Web of Science, IEEE, CrossRef, and Semantic Scholar.

hero.title: Find Related Papers Instantly
hero.subtitle: Enter a paper title and discover related literature from 200M+ academic papers. Free, no sign-up required.

input.placeholder: Enter a paper title, e.g., Attention Is All You Need
input.helper: We'll find related papers from Web of Science, IEEE Xplore, CrossRef, and Semantic Scholar.

results.no_results: No papers found. Try a different title.
